name: Raw Soaps and Suds
description: Handmade, small-batch bar soap made the slow way in Johnson County, Texas. Five essential-oil scents on one shared coconut oil and shea butter base, sold by local pickup only.

makesOffer.description: Handmade bar soap — $4 per bar, or 3 for $10. Mix and match scents. Local pickup in Johnson County, Texas; no shipping and no online checkout.
